538: 
539:   // Load published pooja products from Supabase and merge with static mock products
540:   const loadPublishedProducts = async () => {
541:     try {
542:       const { data, error } = await supabase
543:         .from('website_pooja_products')
544:         .select('*')
545:         .eq('is_published', true)
546:         .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
547: 
548:       if (error) throw error;
549:       if (data) {
550:         const mappedData: Product[] = data.map((item: any) => ({
551:           id: item.id,
552:           name: item.name,
553:           description: item.description,
554:           price: typeof item.price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.price) : item.price,
555:           originalPrice: item.original_price ? (typeof item.original_price === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.original_price) : item.original_price) : undefined,
556:           rating: typeof item.rating === 'string' ? parseFloat(item.rating) : (item.rating || 5.0),
557:           reviewsCount: item.reviews_count || 0,
558:           image: item.image || '📿',
559:           category: item.category,
560:           inStock: item.in_stock ?? true,
561:           benefits: item.benefits || [],
562:           popularity: item.popularity || 80,
563:           spiritualType: item.spiritual_type || 'Rituals',
564:           // custom fields to keep compatibility with PoojaProduct:
565:           sanskritName: item.sanskrit_name,
566:           shortName: item.short_name,
567:           slug: item.slug,
568:           subtitle: item.subtitle,
569:           shortDescription: item.short_description,
<truncated 821 bytes>
imonials: item.testimonials || [],
586:           faqs: item.faqs || [],
587:           bookingInstructions: item.booking_instructions,
588:           ctaLabels: item.cta_labels || { primary: '', secondary: '' },
589:           seoTitle: item.seo_title,
590:           seoDescription: item.seo_description,
591:           canonicalUrl: item.canonical_url,
592:           ogData: item.og_data || { title: '', description: '', image: '' },
593:           schemaMarkup: item.schema_markup || {},
594:           imageAlt: item.image_alt,
595:           imageCaption: item.image_caption,
596:           isFeatured: item.is_featured || false,
597:           isTrending: item.is_trending || false,
598:           recommendationLogic: item.recommendation_logic,
599:           relatedProducts: item.related_products || [],
600:           videoUrl: item.video_url,
601:           translations: item.translations || {},
602:           uiLabels: item.ui_labels || {},
603:           publishedAt: item.published_at,
604:           isPublished: item.is_published || false,
605:           bannerImage: item.banner_image,
606:           galleryImages: item.gallery_images || [],
607:           ritualImages: item.ritual_images || [],
608:           priestImage: item.priest_image,
609:           certificates: item.certificates || [],
610:           iconImage: item.icon_image,
611:           promoCreatives: item.promo_creatives || [],
612:         }));
613: 
614:         setProductsState(mappedData);
615:       }
616:     } catch (err) {
617:       console.error('Error loading published pooja products in storefront:', err);
618:     }
619:   };
620:

623:     saleProductIds?: string[];

625:     featuredTitle?: string;
